_warning: Prices, turnaround times and centering tolerances change CONSTANTLY (PSA paused four Value tiers in June 2026). These are point-in-time approximations compiled from public sources — verify against each company's official site before relying on them. Centering bands below are a transparent approximation; the real algorithms (esp. BGS) are proprietary.
psa10VsPsa9Note: For modern Pokemon, PSA 10 typically sells for 2-5x a PSA 9 — the '9-vs-10 cliff' is where the value and the prediction error both live.

PSA.label: PSA
PSA.known: Deepest resale liquidity; the de-facto market reference.

BGS.label: BGS (Beckett)
BGS.known: Mandatory 4 subgrades on every slab; coveted Black Label (all four 10s).

CGC.label: CGC
CGC.known: Price/speed/consistency; subgrades discontinued on new slabs.

centering._doc: Per grade, 'front' and 'back' are the MAX allowed larger-side percentage on the worst axis (e.g. 55 means up to 55/45). A measured larger-side % must be <= the band to qualify for that grade. Bands ordered best to worst. Omit 'back' to leave the back unconstrained (SGC).

fees._doc: Base grading fee in USD per card and on-site turnaround in business days (excludes shipping transit). maxValueUsd = declared-value cap for the tier. As of 2026-06-24; verify live.

PSA.note: Cheapest tier currently accepting new submissions (Value tiers paused June 2026).

disclaimers: Estimate only — this is NOT an official grade or a guarantee. Grading companies make the final call and outcomes vary on resubmission.

Surface and the card back are systematically under-assessed from photos. Fine scratches, print/roller lines and creases may not be visible. Inspect under bright directional (raking) light at multiple tilt angles.
No authentication. This tool predicts grade, not genuineness. High-value cards (e.g. Charizard secret rares) are heavily counterfeited — authenticate in hand.
Lower confidence on holo / refractor / gold / chrome surfaces, and at the 9-vs-10 boundary where most of the value (and the error) lives.
Centering is measured geometrically and is the most reliable signal; corners/edges/surface come from an AI vision pass and are advisory.
All prices and grading fees are point-in-time and change frequently.
